chunks.text: ORDER SHEET IN THE HIGH COURT OF SINDH BENCH AT SUKKUR Cr. Bail App. No. D – 05 of 2020 Date of hearing Order with signature of Judge Fresh case 1. For orders on MA No.640/2020 (U/A) 2. For orders on MA No.641/2020 (Ex./A) 3. For hearing of bail application 04.02.2020 Mr. Ali Mardan Shar, Advocate for applicant / accused..-.-.-.-.-.-.-.-.-.- Applicant / accused Nazir Ahmed alias Toofan son of Muhammad Sadiq, by caste Kandhro, has applied for protective bail in Crime No.100/2012 registered at P.S Ahmedpur, District Khairpur for offences under Sections 365-A, 324, 353, 148, 149, PPC and 7(e), ATA, 1997. Presently, case is pending before learned Judge, Anti-Terrorism Court, Khairpur and NBWs have been issued against the applicant / accused. It is, inter alia, contended that applicant / accused is prepared to surrender before the trial Court for facing the trial, but he apprehends his arrest as NBWs have been issued against him. Serious mala fide on the part of the police has been alleged. Regarding abconsion, it is stated that he had no knowledge about the registration of the FIR against him and submission of the challan. Without touching the merits of the case, protective bail for a period of four days is granted to the applicant / accused subject to his furnishing solvent surety in the sum of Rs.1,00,000/- (one lac) and P.R. bond in the like amount to the satisfaction of the Additional Registrar of this Court. Operation of NBWs is suspended for a period of four days. Applicant / accused is directed to surrender before the trial Court in the aforesaid period. This order shall cease to have effect after expiry of four days or whenever the applicant / accused surrenders before the trial Court, which one occurs earlier.

Applicant / accused is directed to surrender before the trial Court in the aforesaid period. This order shall cease to have effect after expiry of four days or whenever the applicant / accused surrenders before the trial Court, which one occurs earlier. It is made clear that in case, applicant / accused fails to surrender before the trial Court in the aforesaid period, his bail bond shall stand automatically forfeited. Criminal Bail application along with the listed applications stands disposed of in the above terms. J U D G E J U D G E Abdul Basit
